questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: The important advantage(s) of Lintz and Donawitz (L.D.) process for the manufacture of steel is (are)
questions.solution:
Lintz and Donawitz (L.D.) process is an important process for manufacturing of steel. In India, Rourkela steel plant is based upon this process.
This process is carried out in a converter similar to bessemer converter having lining (usually refractory made of $\mathrm{Mg} \mathrm{O}$ and $(\mathrm{CaO})$.
In this method scrap iron can be used along with flux in converter : On passing oxygen gas at $4-12$ atm pressure into converter, temperature of $2000-2500^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$ range produced which separates C. Si, Mn etc., impurities as slag from
iron quickly remaining pure iron is mixed with spiegeleisen (alloy Fe, $\mathrm{Mn}$, C) to produce better quality steel.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.chapter: General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Metals
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: the correct statement(s) among the following is/are
options: Argentite and magnetite are oxide ores
Anglesite and barytes are sulphate ores
Galena and cinnabar are sulphide ores
Siderite and malachite are carbonate ores
questions.solution:
The chemical formulae of the given minerals are
\begin{array}{lllll} Argentite & : & \mathrm{Ag}_2 \mathrm{~S} & Magnetite & : \\\mathrm{Fe}_3 \mathrm{O}_4 \\Anglesite & : & \mathrm{PbSO}_4 & Baryte : & \mathrm{BaSO}_4 \\Galena & : & PbS & Cinnabar & : \\HgS \\Siderite & : & \mathrm{FeCO}_3 & Malachite & : \mathrm{CuCO}_3 \mathrm{Cu}(\mathrm{OH})_2\end{array}
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.q: The role of fluorspar, which is added in small quantities in the electrolytic reduction of alumina dissolved in fused cryolite is
options: to lower the melting temperature of the mixture
to decrease the rate of oxidation of carbon at anode
questions.solution: Among the given statements (b) and (c) are correct these are the facts.

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.chapter: General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Metals
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Zine and silver can be separated from each other by
questions.solution: Zinc has low boiling point and can be easily separated from silver by distillation. On heating with conc. NaOH , zinc goes into solution forming $\mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{ZnO}_2$ but silver is unaffected. Both dil. $\mathrm{HNO}_3$ and conc. $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{SO}_4$ react with Zn as well as Ag .
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
